title: Diqlah #1853
definition:
Diklah = "palm grove"

 n pr m
 1) a son of Joktan of Arabia

 n pr loc
 2) an Arabian territory or people?
nasbUsage:
Definition: Diklah = "palm grove"

 n pr m
 1) a son of Joktan of Arabia

 n pr loc
 2) an Arabian territory or people?

    NASB:  a son of Joktan, also the S. Arabian tribe desc. from him
